ddls:
CREATE TABLE "form_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form element */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form to which the element belongs */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent form element */,
  "parent_pos" INTEGER /* Position of the element within its parent */,
  "col_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the column in the form */,
  "type" TEXT /* Data type of the form element (e.g., Text, Number, Date) */,
  "widget_options" TEXT /* Options for the widget used to display the form element */,
  "is_formula" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the element is a formula */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the value of the element */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the form element */,
  "summary_source_col" INTEGER /* ID of the column used for summary calculations */,
  "untie_col_id_from_label" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the column ID should be independent of the label */,
  "display_col" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the column should be displayed */,
  "visible_col" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the column should be visible */,
  "recalc_when" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the element should be recalculated */,
  "recalc_dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies for recalculation */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the form element is required */,
  "validation_rules" TEXT /* Validation rules for the form element */,
  "dependency_ids" TEXT /* IDs of dependent form elements for recalculation */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Calculation formula for the form element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_elements_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES form_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_elements_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the form */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the form */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the form was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the form was last updated */,
  "form_template" TEXT /* Template used for the form */,
  "form_status" TEXT /* Status of the form (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "submit_message" TEXT /* Message displayed after form submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form to which the entry belongs */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was last updated */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the data for the entry */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the data entry (e.g., draft, submitted, approved) */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the entry */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the form */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the form was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_expiration" TEXT /* Date and time the access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_access_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entry_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_expiration" TEXT /* Date and time the access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entry_access_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entry_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form version */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the form */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the form data for this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_versions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entry_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry version */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the data for this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entry_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entry_versions_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_element_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form element type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the form element type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the form element type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
